title: Virtual Ecosystem Simulator
description: An artificial life simulation platform featuring multi-tier agent-based ecology with plants, herbivores, and carnivores. Built on HTML5 Canvas with 60fps dual-canvas rendering — an ecosystem arena showing real-time agent interactions and a population trend chart. Features adjustable sunlight, water, mutation rate, and speed controls, plus viral outbreak and re-seed mechanics. Pure vanilla JavaScript — no frameworks or libraries.
